channel.title: Protein Design Podcast
channel.description: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research
channel.itunes:author: Eva Dai
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-06-27
item.description: The first thing that jumps out is how the bottleneck of hardware and expertise is finally being cracked open. | A second paradigm change comes from the chemistry side. | The copper‑alloy paper flips the script on how we treat processing data.
item.itunes:author: Eva Dai
item.itunes:summary: The first thing that jumps out is how the bottleneck of hardware and expertise is finally being cracked open. | A second paradigm change comes from the chemistry side. | The copper‑alloy paper flips the script on how we treat processing data.
